results.failure: The noble nods politely but declines. 'We have no need at present. Return when you have a more concrete offer or notable success to show.'

results.success: You uncover a pattern of correspondence and a hidden ledger linking the family to a distant estate in {location}. The evidence suggests a motive worth pursuing.
results.failure: Your search turns up only carefully curated records and polite denials. The household keeps its secrets well; you'll need better access or a bribe.

results: You find a sheltered bench beneath a flowering arbor. The city noise fades and you rest, regaining a measure of strength.
A quiet glade offers a cool breeze and the scent of herbs. You close your eyes and let the day's tension ease.
A gardener's cat curls at your feet as you nap on soft grass. You wake refreshed and alert to the sounds of the district.
A fountain's steady trickle lulls you into a short, restorative sleep. You wake with clearer thoughts and steadier hands.
You rest beneath a shaded pergola while distant children play. The brief respite sharpens your focus for the tasks ahead.

results.success: You identify and gather a useful bundle of herbs, including a common poultice and a fragrant leaf prized by apothecaries.
results.failure: You collect a handful of common weeds and miss the subtle plants you sought. The harvest is meager and of little use.

results.success: You slip into a shadowed alcove and exchange a brief, coded conversation with your contact. They hand you a folded note and vanish into the trees.
results.failure: You are noticed by a passing gardener who asks questions. Your contact retreats, leaving only a hurried whisper and no meeting.

results: From a shaded path you watch a procession of merchants moving through the {district}, their wagons heavy with goods.
You notice a pair of figures speaking in hushed tones near a statue; one carries a satchel stamped with a merchant mark from {location}.
A gardener tends a secluded bed and mentions an unusual delivery last night — crates left unmarked at the service gate.
Children chase each other past a hedge and one drops a scrap of paper with a hastily drawn map and a time circled.
A city watch patrol passes slowly, noting nothing unusual; their relaxed pace suggests the area is considered safe for now.
A washerwoman gossiping at the edge of the well mentions a stranger asking questions about {location} late last night.
Two merchants argue about a recent shipment delay; one swears the caravan was waylaid near the old ford.
A child trading gossip for a coin whispers about a hidden meeting place beneath the market stalls.
An elderly man recalls seeing a patrol escort a covered wagon through the district at dawn.
A vendor warns that someone has been offering unusual coin for simple favors; 'Not the sort you want to cross,' they say.
You lower your waterskin and fill it with cool, clear water drawn from the well. The weight steadies your pack.
A local offers to trade a small favor for fresh water and a bit of bread as thanks.
A child splashes nearby and hands you a clean cloth to wipe the rim; the wellkeeper nods in approval.
You notice a faint shimmer on the water's surface — a sign of mineral content common to wells fed from {location}.
A passerby warns you to boil water before long travel; 'Strange sickness comes from unboiled wells sometimes,' they say.
From the well you watch bakers hauling sacks of flour toward the market and hear the rhythm of their work.
A pair of apprentices practice a trade argument nearby, loudly rehearsing a sales pitch for a visiting merchant.
A street performer draws a small crowd; their tricks distract a pickpocket who slips away into the alleys.
A cart creaks by, loaded with produce stamped from {location}; the driver exchanges a curt nod with the wellkeeper.
An old woman feeds crumbs to pigeons and tells a story about the founding of the district to anyone who will listen.

results.success: You catch a hushed phrase about a planned meeting and a time — a useful lead that mentions {npc_name}.
results.failure: The crowd is noisy and your ears pick up only fragments: a name, a place, and nothing you can trust.

results.success: A vendor leans in and shares a useful tidbit: a merchant route has been altered and a guard detail reduced near {location}.
results.failure: The vendor smiles politely but refuses. 'I don't trade in secrets for coin today,' they say.

results: You spend time in the lecture hall reading tomes and notes; a tutor helps clarify difficult passages and you gain useful context.
A scholar points you to a marginal note in an old volume that references {location} and a forgotten ordinance.
You compile a short dossier from the library's holdings that outlines the historical ownership of a disputed parcel of land.
A professor offers a brief lecture on the subject and suggests a primary source you hadn't considered.
Your research yields a lead: a name, a date, and a reference to a ledger kept in the Courthouse archives.

results.success: A junior scholar agrees to tutor you for a modest fee. 'I can help you master the basics and prepare notes for your research,' they say.
results.failure: The tutors are booked or demand a higher fee. 'Return next tenday or bring more coin,' the headmaster advises.

results: A librarian retrieves a bound volume of city records that mentions a merchant house operating near {location}.
You are shown a map with annotations marking old trade routes and a note about seasonal floods affecting supply lines.
A stack of lecture notes contains a passing reference to a ritual once performed in the district — now outlawed.
A dusty folio reveals a list of craftsmen and their specialties; one entry names {npc_name} as a patron.
A ledger of donations lists a benefactor who funded a small chapel; the entry includes a cryptic marginalia.
An archivist recounts the founding of the neighborhood and mentions a long‑buried dispute over water rights.
You learn of a past epidemic that reshaped trade patterns and led to the construction of the Public Well.
A lecture excerpt describes a forgotten guild that once controlled the mills near {location}.
A preserved letter hints at a clandestine meeting between nobles and merchants in the early years of the city.
A scholar points out a plaque in the courtyard commemorating a benefactor whose name appears in several old deeds.

results.success: You uncover a primary document — a deed or letter — that directly references the matter you're researching and names a key witness.
results.failure: The archives are vast and poorly indexed; you find related material but nothing conclusive. The archivist suggests a different search term.

results.success: Under a master's guidance you grasp a technique or concept that improves your practical knowledge and can be applied in the field.
results.failure: The lesson proves challenging; you understand the theory but lack the hands‑on practice to apply it effectively.

results: A friendly shopkeeper produces a bundle of salted meat, a coil of rope, and a small oil lamp. 'Good for a traveler,' they say.
You find a neat stack of preserved fruit jars and a roll of cured cloth. 'Locally made,' the owner adds with a proud nod.
A child behind the counter offers a discount on a second item if you buy both at once. 'Helps clear space,' they whisper.
A shelf of basic tools — a hammer, a set of nails, a whetstone — is offered at fair price and immediate use.
A small crate marked from {location} contains spices and dried herbs; the proprietor recommends them for long journeys.

results.success: The shopkeeper inspects your goods and offers a fair price plus a small trade credit. 'We can move these quickly,' they say.
results.failure: The proprietor shakes their head. 'Not what my customers want. I can only offer a token amount or store them on consignment.'

results: A baker mutters about a late wagon that unloaded crates at dawn near {location}; 'Not the usual merchants,' they say.
An old woman at the door complains that {npc_name} has been asking after a missing ledger — and paying well for answers.
A grocer mentions a new watch posted on the lane; 'They say it's because of recent petty thefts,' they add.
A child trading sweets for gossip tells you about a quiet meeting in a back room behind the tailor's shop.
A neighbor warns of a traveling peddler selling oddly marked coin; 'Keep your eyes on your purse,' they advise.

results.success: A shopkeeper needs help stacking crates and offers a day's wage plus a hot meal. 'Come by at first light,' they say.
results.failure: The proprietor apologizes: 'We're short today, but no extra hands until next week. Try the market stalls.'

results: A street preacher's sermon draws a crowd; afterward several listeners whisper about a merchant dispute involving {npc_name}.
A traveling performer mentions a caravan diverted from {location} and hints at trouble on the northern road.
A vendor loudly complains about missing crates; nearby patrons speculate about a new gang operating in the docks.
A posted proclamation about taxes sparks heated debate; someone mutters that enforcement will hit the {district} hardest.
A pair of cloaked figures exchange a sealed note near the fountain; onlookers speculate it's a clandestine appointment.
You pin your notice to the central board and a clerk stamps it with the town seal. 'It will be visible for a tenday,' they say.
A passerby reads your notice and nods; within hours a small crowd gathers, discussing the announcement.
A rival posts a counter‑notice beneath yours; the clerk warns that disputes over public postings sometimes escalate.
A notice attracts the attention of a local guild representative who asks to speak privately about the matter.
Your posting is noted by a city official; later you receive a curt summons to clarify the claim.

results.success: You scan the crowd and pick out the person you seek — a merchant with a distinctive cloak stamped from {location}. They agree to speak briefly.
results.failure: The square is crowded and noisy; you lose the trail and must rely on second‑hand directions to locate the NPC.

results: A procession of city officials passes through, heralding a new ordinance that may affect trade in the {district}.
A sudden commotion reveals a street performance that draws a large crowd and distracts nearby pickpockets.
A market fair is announced; traveling merchants set up stalls and rare goods from {location} appear for sale.
A public dispute between two guilds escalates into a shouting match; city watch moves in to separate them.
A messenger arrives with urgent news and posts a sealed proclamation at the square's noticeboard.

results.success: You arrange a brief, public exchange at a fountain and receive a folded note with a time and place for a private meeting.
results.failure: Your intended contact is delayed or distracted by the crowd; the meeting dissolves into vague promises to 'catch up later.'

results: Shelves creak under the weight of assorted adventuring gear: a spare grappling hook, a coil of rope, and a battered lantern marked with a merchant seal from {location}.
A neat row of preserved rations and hardtack is displayed; the shopkeeper offers a small sample to prove freshness.
You find a set of common tools — hammer, nails, and a whetstone — arranged for immediate purchase.
A dusty crate yields a handful of curios: a carved bone token, a chipped vial, and a map fragment with a circled landmark.
A rack of simple weapons includes a few serviceable daggers and a short spear; the proprietor warns which ones are well balanced.

results.success: The shopkeeper inspects your wares and offers a fair price of {amount} gp, adding a small trade credit for future purchases.
results.failure: The proprietor frowns at the condition and offers a token amount. 'Not what my customers want today,' they say.

results: A regular customer mentions a caravan diverted from {location} and suggests the northern road is slower than usual.
The shopkeeper complains about a recent string of petty thefts and points to a suspicious new face seen near the market.
A child running errands whispers that {npc_name} has been asking after a missing parcel and offering coin for information.
A delivery manifest pinned behind the counter shows an unusual supplier name and a note about expedited handling.
A neighbor stops by to trade gossip: a minor noble is rumored to be hiring discreet muscle for a private errand.
You pin a small notice to the shop's board; within hours a passerby reads it aloud and several patrons take interest.
The proprietor offers to read notices for a small fee and points out a recently posted request for labor near {location}.
A rival posts a counter‑notice beneath yours; the shopkeeper warns that public disputes sometimes draw unwanted attention.
You read a notice seeking lost livestock with a reward; the owner mentions the claimant is a frequent customer named {npc_name}.
A clerk offers to circulate your notice to neighboring shops for an extra charge, increasing its visibility across the district.

results.success: The shopkeeper relents and offers a modest discount. 'Alright, take it for {amount} less — but only because you're a regular.'
results.failure: The proprietor smiles politely and refuses. 'Prices are tight this season. I can't lower it further.'

results: You secure a private room for the night. The bed is clean and the innkeeper promises a quiet hour; you wake refreshed and restored.
A shared chamber is available with a curtained berth; the other lodgers are noisy but respectful and you manage a decent rest.
The inn provides a simple supper and a warm bed. A stablehand offers to watch your mount for a small fee.
A friendly patron offers a tip about a safer route out of town in the morning; you sleep with a useful lead in mind.
The innkeeper notes a curfew for late guests and records your name in the guest ledger for the night.
A steaming bowl of stew is set before you, rich with root vegetables and a chunk of salted meat. 'House specialty,' the innkeeper says.
A mug of local ale is poured from a cask stamped with a merchant mark from {location}; it's hearty and cheap.
A tray of cold cuts and bread is offered for travelers on the road; the cook recommends it for long journeys.
A small plate of preserved fruit and cheese is presented as a light supper; the proprietor warns that fresh produce is scarce this season.
A guest offers to trade a story for a meal and mentions a caravan needing escorts near {location}.
A tipsy merchant boasts about a lost shipment from {location} and hints at a hidden cache of goods waiting to be reclaimed.
A barkeep mentions that {npc_name} has been seen meeting with a cloaked stranger at odd hours.
A traveling soldier complains of increased patrols on the road and warns of bandit activity near the old ford.
A pair of locals argue about a new tax; one claims enforcement will hit small traders hardest in the {district}.
A quiet corner table yields a whispered lead: a private job posted for discreet hands, pay negotiable.
You pin a notice on the inn's board and a stableboy reads it aloud to passing patrons; interest is immediate.
A guard from {district} studies your notice. 'Interesting timing,' they mutter. 'Someone else asked about similar work near {location}.'
A cloaked traveler approaches after reading your posting. 'If you're serious,' they whisper, 'meet me behind the stables at dusk.'
A scribe offers to copy and distribute your notice to nearby inns for {amount} gp. 'Wider reach, faster results,' they promise.
Moments after you post it, someone tears down a rival notice and replaces it beneath yours. The innkeeper frowns. 'Competition’s heating up.'
An inn regular points out a symbol someone has drawn on your notice — a mark associated with {creature} sightings. 'Might be a warning,' they say.
{npc_name}, a local {npc_role}, asks if you can deliver a similar notice to a contact in {location}. 'If you’re already posting things, you might as well earn a favor.'

results.success: A patron needs hands for a short job in the kitchen and hires you on the spot. 'Start at dawn. Bring sturdy boots,' they say, handing over a small advance of {amount} gp.
results.failure: The patrons are uninterested or demand higher pay than you can offer. 'Try the market tomorrow,' someone suggests.

results.success: You catch a fragment of conversation about a guarded crate arriving from {location} and a time for its transfer — a lead worth following.
results.failure: The room is loud and your ears pick up only disconnected phrases; nothing actionable emerges from the din.

results: A humble acolyte retrieves a small vial from a locked coffer. 'Donated by a traveling cleric,' they say. 'Use it well.'
A caretaker presents a potion wrapped in cloth. 'We keep only a few — take this if your need is true.'
The attendant retrieves a potion sealed with wax. 'Prepared at dawn by {npc_name} the cleric. Their blessings tend to linger longer than most.'
A caretaker offers a potion wrapped in soft cloth. 'We keep only a few. This one was meant for a traveler who never returned from {location}.'
A pilgrim donates a potion the moment you arrive. 'Take it,' the shrinekeeper insists. 'They said someone in need would come today.'
The vial glows faintly as you hold it. 'A sign of harmony,' the acolyte murmurs. 'Use it where the light is thin.'
The shrinekeeper hesitates. 'This batch was brewed after strange omens in {district}. It should work… but be mindful of dreams tonight. (use lore generator - Dreams)'
The potion is unusually heavy. 'Infused with herbs from the south,' the attendant explains. 'Rare, but potent — and not without side effects.'

results.success: You kneel and recite a short prayer. A gentle warmth settles over you as the shrine's guardian spirit acknowledges your devotion.
results.failure: Your thoughts wander during the prayer. The acolyte smiles kindly. 'Perhaps return when your mind is clearer.'

results: You rest beneath a carved symbol of protection. The quiet air and faint incense help you recover your strength.
A caretaker offers a cushion and a cup of warm herbal tea. You relax and feel tension leave your body.
Soft chanting from a nearby alcove lulls you into a peaceful rest, restoring your focus.
A pilgrim shares a comforting story of the shrine's miracles as you rest, easing your worries.
You sit beside a small brazier, its gentle heat calming your nerves and steadying your breath.
A caretaker mentions disturbances near {location}. 'Nothing confirmed, but travelers return uneasy.'
A pilgrim recalls seeing {npc_name} speaking with a cloaked figure near the crossroads. 'They seemed in a hurry.'
The acolyte warns of a sick traveler who passed through recently. 'If trouble spreads, it will start in {district}.'
A worshipper shares a rumor about a hidden spring in the {district}, said to heal wounds but only at dusk.
A visiting monk mentions a caravan delayed by strange tracks along the main road to the city— too large for any known beast.
'Listen,' a caretaker whispers, 'someone has been leaving offerings meant for Fiends. That’s not a good sign.'
A pilgrim tells you about {npc_name} the {npc_role}, who claims to have found an abandoned shrine near {location}. 'They won’t go back alone.'
A monk studying old scrolls believes a forgotten ritual site lies beneath {district}. 'If you find it, tread with respect.'
You start a long training session - Go to downtime activities section to train

results.success: A productive sparring session. You hold your own and earn some respect in the process. The soldier mentions a training method worth incorporating.
results.failure: The soldier wins the bout without difficulty. Not unkind about it — professionals rarely are. 'Come back when you've practiced that footwork.'

results: A retired veteran named {npc_name} trains privately. Expensive — {amount} gp per session — but their reputation is excellent.
The training ground master agrees to assess you and recommend appropriate instruction. Honest assessment: your strengths, your gaps.
A skilled instructor is available, but they want to see you fight first before agreeing to take you on.
'I know someone,' a guard says. 'Not official. Very good. Doesn't advertise. I can introduce you.'
The guards run routine drills: nothing impressive, nothing alarming. A competent but unremarkable force.
You watch a formation exercise. Their discipline is solid, though a few recruits struggle to keep pace.
A sergeant from {district} explains that the local watch is stretched thin due to recent patrol expansions.
A veteran mentions sightings of {creature} near {location}. 'If those reports are true, we’re not equipped for that kind of threat.'
You overhear instructors discussing outdated equipment. 'Half our shields are older than I am,' one mutters.
A captain quietly offers you a deal: for {amount} gp, they’ll share detailed maps of patrol routes and blind spots.
During weapons inspection, an instructor finds several blades with unusual wear patterns. 'Something’s been testing our defenses,' they say.
{npc_name}, a drillmaster, asks for your help evaluating a new training regimen. 'Fresh eyes catch things we miss.'
